nasb.text: For thus the Lord said to me, “In a year, as a hired man would count it, all the splendor of Kedar will terminate;

esv.text: For thus the Lord said to me, “Within a year, according to the years of a hired worker, all the glory of Kedar will come to an end.

cnv.text: 主對我這樣說：“按照雇工的年數，一年之內，基達的一切光榮都必化為烏有。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“如同雇工合约规定的做工年限，一年之内，基达所有的荣耀必消失，

csbs.text: 主对我如此说：“一个雇工年之内，基达的一切荣耀都必灭尽。
